label: KPA Invasion Route — Seoul (June 1950)
notes: North Korean People's Army crossed 38th parallel and captured Seoul within 3 days of invasion

label: Operation Chromite — Inchon to Seoul (Sep 1950)
notes: MacArthur's UN forces advanced from Inchon landing to liberate Seoul September 28, 1950

label: DPRK Artillery — Yeonpyeong Island (Nov 2010)
notes: North Korean artillery fired 170+ shells at South Korean island; 4 killed

label: Japanese Army Advance — Busan to Seoul (1592)
notes: Toyotomi Hideyoshi's forces advanced rapidly from landing at Busan northward through the peninsula during the Imjin War
